schema.description: The representation of the summary of contractor payments for a given company in a given time period.

total.description: The wage and reimbursement totals for all contractor payments within a given time period.

reimbursements.description: The total reimbursements for contractor payments within a given time period.

wages.description: The total wages for contractor payments within a given time period.

contractor_payments.description: The individual contractor payments, within a given time period, grouped by contractor.

reimbursement_total.description: The total reimbursements for the contractor within a given time period.

wage_total.description: The total wages for the contractor within a given time period.

payments.description: The contractor's payments within a given time period.

items.description: The representation of a single contractor payment.
items.title: Contractor Payment

uuid.description: The unique identifier of the contractor payment in Gusto.

bonus.description: The bonus amount in the payment.

hours.description: The number of hours worked for the payment.

reimbursement.description: The reimbursement amount in the payment.

hourly_rate.description: The rate per hour worked for the payment.

may_cancel.description: Determine if the contractor payment can be cancelled.

wage.description: The fixed wage of the payment, regardless of hours worked.

wage_type.description: The wage type for the payment.

schema.title: Contractor-Payment-Summary
